title: Origin Fairness, Politeness, Retries, Backoff, and p-limit · Contract Lens: Clock Injection
summary: One global concurrency number bursts a single origin, retries synchronize, Retry-After is ignored, and p-limit is treated as a complete scheduler. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Competency probe: Inject monotonic and wall clocks so spacing, deadlines, backoff, fairness, and clock jumps are deterministic in tests.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Clock Injection model · Theory Clock Injection, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Real sleeps are the most trustworthy scheduler test.
